snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public and documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code, and shared executable schemas. Focused automated gates execute current implementation and test evidence on every run.

reviewers.independence: Fresh read-only reviewer of the exact 101-file candidate; independently checked Scratch single ownership, bounded PPTX-media-OCR implementation evidence and Owner propagation, manifest limits, private materialization, locator and evidence wiring, unchanged stable IDs and statuses, the 1,051-claim semantic lock, preserved residual gaps, budgets, and expected pre-binding TRC-005 staleness without editing files.

Fresh read-only Owner and active-development reviewer on the exact 101-file candidate; independently checked the single Scratch projection, synchronized Tech/Parser/API/Job/Source/Security/Playbook/Quality/acceptance ownership of selected PPTX media OCR, the sole new evidence projection, unchanged partial states and stable IDs, the reviewed 1,051-claim lock, executable evidence, contracts, dependencies, and budgets without editing files.

Fresh read-only source, license, security, implementation-boundary, and exact-candidate reviewer; independently verified Scratch's README-only MIT assertion and absent LICENSE, static clean-room boundary, zero runtime or acceptance projection, and the Pige-owned PPTX media limits, private inputs, locator/checksum/revision protection, exact evidence selector, unchanged partial states, no new dependency, and preserved security gaps without editing files.

dimensions.summary: All governed resources remain uniquely routed. Scratch has one fixed-release TECH row; PPTX capability facts stay in existing Tech, Parser, API, Job, Source, Security, Playbook, Quality, parser-manifest, fixture, and acceptance owners without creating an orphan document or resource.

Tech, Parser, API, Job, Source, Security, Playbook, Quality, parser manifest, smoke, code evidence, and acceptance agree on parser-selected PPTX raster OCR and on the residual full-slide, unsupported-media, cross-platform, packaging, progress, cancellation, CAS, and transaction gaps. Scratch remains one non-normative reference row.

One executable evidence ID is projected only to PIGE-INGEST-004 and E5.05; both remain partial and P5 remains in progress. All stable scope identities and statuses remain unchanged, and explicit semantic review advanced the lock from 1,050 to 1,051 claims before TRC-001 through TRC-005 passed.

The bounded PPTX raster path is immediately usable by active P5 work while every unsupported and platform gap remains explicit. Scratch contributes source-mode continuity, command discovery, external-change, and tool-readiness comparisons but cannot alter the editor choice, Permission Broker, dependency set, or implementation order.

LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 4,190 entry words, 57 Markdown files, 22,813 lines, 162,938 words, 1,209,581 bytes, 5,487 trace lines, zero duplicate groups, and 14 mutation cases. Concise Owner replacements offset new semantics, though capacity remains extremely tight.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:dependencies
verification.evidence: Document inventory, 114 local links, 45 anchors, whitespace, parser manifests, 76 decisions, 12 UI tokens, 8 structural rules, 448 visual combinations, CON-001 through CON-004, Owner-negative cases, and 45 dependency records with zero waivers passed.

verification.command: npm run verify:prd-contract && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: The 151/9/10 scope baseline, 98 Requirements, 140 Builds, 96 Exits, 32 Deferred records, 1,051 semantic claims, 13 PRD negative cases, TRC-001 through TRC-005, and 22 traceability false-positive mutations passed; Scratch has no trace projection and PPTX evidence keeps partial states.
All 54 test files and 318 tests passed; package and desktop type checks passed on the frozen implementation handoff.
The focused four-file, 48-test suite passed, including production-adapter PPTX media OCR, Job gating, evidence locators, private inputs, reuse, source revision, and referenced-original cases.

Root verification regenerated the ignored independent report before traceability consumed it, then passed TRC-001 through TRC-005, contracts, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, source-artifact, leanness, and the final five-dimension scorecard after this binding.

All five leanness checks passed: 4,190 entry words, zero unapproved short-line/list/table/multiline/fenced/declaration/URL/near-prose groups, 14 mutation cases, 57 Markdown files, 5,487 trace lines, and 9.02% line reduction.

coordination.compatibility: P0-P9 phases, M0-M7 milestones, all stable Requirement/Build/Exit IDs, current statuses, and P5 open scope remain unchanged. The semantic lock advances to 1,051 only for one executable PPTX evidence claim and two acceptance digests. Scratch remains one static TECH reference with no dependency, acceptance, scope, or implementation-order effect.
coordination.acknowledgement: The development task kept TECH §16.1 and the recipe frozen, delivered 54 files/318 tests plus build and real worker/OCR smokes, and then froze governed surfaces. Owner text and acceptance were synchronized by concise replacements; three fresh read-only reviewers checked the final 101-file combined snapshot before this single binding.

resolvedBlockers: Removed the recurring quality-line slogan from repository guidance and kept completion criteria as internal verification rules rather than repeated response copy.
Recast the PRD as an AI Coding Agent product contract with explicit authority, optimization order, default user model, observable states, product scenarios, risks, and Owner references.
Added bidirectional PRD-impact classes and propagation controls, then preserved all 151 P0 items while removing implementation-detail leakage and duplicate future-scope prose.

Removed conflicting parser/runtime types, repeated technical limits, directory trees, Settings/SQLite/prompt blocks, copied policy/test lists, duplicate references, and repeated short normative sentences in favor of one Owner plus narrow projections.

Replaced the false-pass duplicate check with strict schema-v2 LEN-002 coverage for short lines, lists, tables, mixed blocks, fenced content, declarations, external URLs, and ordered near prose; zero unapproved groups and 14 mutation cases now pass.

Registered Paperling, Crawl4AI, Microsoft MarkItDown, OfficeCLI, LLM Wiki, AutoCLI, OpenDataLoader PDF, and Scratch once each as pinned static research; none enters dependency or acceptance manifests, and each retains explicit no-reuse/no-runtime boundaries.

Preserved and independently reviewed the Clean-Room Visual System, then made its machine manifest both an explicit snapshot root and a verifier-required root so the manual review cannot silently omit it; structural checks still do not claim packaged screenshot acceptance.

Aligned Source Storage, Parser, Job, Prompt, Playbook, Quality, and acceptance evidence with the implemented third SourceRecord check, create-only note publication, conflict preservation, same-source recovery, and strict untrusted output while preserving partial status and every residual commit window.

Corrected PDF/PPTX parser, OCR, revision, IPC, Job, Security, Playbook, Quality, and acceptance ownership as implementation evolved; explicit semantic review advanced the lock from 1,040 through 1,050 to 1,051 claims without changing stable IDs or partial states.

Completed the exact B5.12 deterministic contract with seven multilingual text/URL/PDF/PPTX/image-OCR cases and four negative controls, promoting only PIGE-EVAL-001 and E5.04 while preserving PIGE-PROMPT-001, E5.03, and P5 open scope.

Moved independent-report generation ahead of root traceability while retaining final scorecard regeneration, so a clean clone no longer fails TRC-005 merely because the ignored manual-review artifact has not yet been generated.
nonBlockingRisks: P5 remains in progress: strict cross-process SourceRecord CAS, parent-swap-resistant commits, cross-file transactions and orphan recovery, packaged/signed platform proof, Windows/Paddle, full-slide/vector/chart/DOCX-media and unsupported or oversized targets, full Pi-runtime proof, visible progress, and cooperative cancellation remain open.

The entry budget has only 10 words of headroom, trace manifests use 5,487 of 5,500 lines, and governed Markdown has only 562 words and 419 bytes of physical budget remaining; future additions must reclaim repetition or machine projection capacity in the same change.

TECH_ARCHITECTURE, PRD, and Decision Log remain large Owner documents; future Agents must continue section-targeted reads, while similarity checks remain complemented by Owner and focused contract gates.

External-reference pins are review-time facts; experiments must repeat license, provenance, SBOM, security, privacy, supply-chain, isolation, platform, and Permission Broker checks. Scratch v0.10.0 has only a README MIT claim and its tag lacks LICENSE; its code, styles, assets, TipTap/Tauri runtime, unsafe AI CLI/filesystem/Git/updater paths, and direct-write behavior are not authorized for reuse.

Root verification intentionally generates the ignored independent-review artifact before traceability and again inside the standalone documentation-quality sequence; the second write only refreshes generatedAt and is a small non-blocking runtime cost that preserves both clean-clone and standalone self-bootstrap behavior.

B5.12 is a synthetic deterministic evaluation over static model outputs; it verifies the exact E5.04 contract but does not prove arbitrary provider-model quality, real parser/OCR fidelity, or packaged-platform behavior. Public URL/DOCX/PDF/PPTX/image-OCR adversarial cases do not replace full Pi tool/Permission Broker runtime proof, so PIGE-PROMPT-001 and E5.03 remain partial.

The Clean-Room label records a repository implementation constraint, not a legal conclusion; future UI work must not reread or copy external code, branded assets, fonts, exact compositions, or other protected expression and may still require specialist legal review.

The focused evidence does not yet include an exact positive selector for PDF OCR merging into the latest Source Record, nor dedicated assertions for the 16 KiB preview limit and temporary-file flags; current status correctly remains partial.

The UI visual verifier checks governed structural markers, not semantic Owner equivalence, accessibility, or packaged fidelity; real macOS/Windows captures and human review remain open, and baseline PNG/sidecar retention or pruning must be defined when the capture runner is implemented.
Any intentional PRD scope, Owner contract, evidence, status, or semantic-claim change still requires readable impact review and explicit lock regeneration rather than mechanical acceptance.
